description:
Restore an official Moodle course backup file as a new course. The backup file is located at /home/ga/Downloads/moodle-qa-course.mbz.

Requirements:
1. Restore the backup as a *new course*.
2. Place the new course in the 'Humanities' category.
3. Change the Course full name to 'Digital Literacy 101 - Fall 2026'.
4. Change the Course short name to 'DL101-F26'.
5. Retain all original content from the backup (default restore settings).

Moodle is currently logged in with the Administrator account.
